title: The War at Marineford Begins: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are you sure it's this island!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: five children were born this month.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The women due next month are...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: EHHH!!!? What!!? whose kid is this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Was it two years ago now...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're the only one who thinks that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Because you were protected by white- beard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Fleet Admiral Sengoku!! We have a report!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can't contact the control room...!!!
